name: nox-mem-a2-tier3-staged
description: A2 Tier 3 staged code — P1 db.ts SQLCipher key-open wire-up + P2 plaintext-to-encrypted migration script + P3 reads_audit opt-in wrapper + retention sweep + P4 Ed25519 signed audit checkpoints + P5 deployment runbook/automation/smoke. Wraps better-sqlite3-multiple-ciphers with NOX_DB_KEY env-driven PRAGMA key + cipher_compatibility=4 + defaultSafeIntegers(true).

scripts.copy-sql: mkdir -p dist/edits/src/lib && cp edits/src/lib/reads-audit-schema.sql dist/edits/src/lib/reads-audit-schema.sql && cp edits/src/lib/audit-checkpoints-schema.sql dist/edits/src/lib/audit-checkpoints-schema.sql
scripts.test: tsc && npm run copy-sql && node --test dist/edits/src/lib/__tests__/*.test.js dist/scripts/__tests__/*.test.js
